<!--
  Thanks for contributing to PeptidesDB. Fill in the sections that apply
  and delete the rest. The atlas is a community manuscript — small,
  well-cited PRs are the unit of progress.

  Schema reminder: every claim should be backed by a citation, or marked
  uncited. The audit (`bun run audit:peptides`) runs in CI; please run
  it locally first.
-->

## What this PR changes

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Mark with x. -->

- [ ] New citation (added or upgraded a reference)
- [ ] Correction to an existing claim
- [ ] New peptide plate
- [ ] Typo / formatting / link fix
- [ ] Component, page, or design change
- [ ] Schema, infra, or tooling change
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Plates affected

<!-- Slugs and sections, e.g. tesamorelin (mechanism, evidence). -->

## Citations added or changed

<!--
  PubMed IDs or DOIs. List each with a one-line note on what claim it
  supports. Example:
  - PMID:17636085 — supports the 15% VAT reduction figure in evidence
-->

## Local checks

<!-- Confirm what you ran. -->

- [ ] `bun run audit:peptides` passes
- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and the relevant section of [DESIGN.md](../DESIGN.md)

## Compliance

- [ ] Content is for research reference only — no medical claims, no dosing recommendations, no clinical guidance
- [ ] Sources cited are primary literature where possible (peer-reviewed papers, official labels, regulatory documents) — not commercial vendor pages

## Notes for reviewer

<!--
  Anything the maintainer should know — reasoning, related issues, open
  questions, or follow-up work this PR does not cover.
-->
